=== AccountStatusesFilter ===
# frozen_string_literal: true

class AccountStatusesFilter
  KEYS = %i(
    pinned
    tagged
    only_media
    exclude_replies
    exclude_reblogs
  ).freeze

  attr_reader :params, :account, :current_account

  def initialize(account, current_account, params = {})
    @account         = account
    @current_account = current_account
    @params          = params
  end

  def results
    scope = initial_scope

    scope.merge!(pinned_scope)     if pinned?
    scope.merge!(only_media_scope) if only_media?
    scope.merge!(no_replies_scope) if exclude_replies?
    scope.merge!(no_reblogs_scope) if exclude_reblogs?
    scope.merge!(hashtag_scope)    if tagged?

    scope
  end

  private

  def initial_scope
    return Status.none if account.unavailable?

    if anonymous?
      account.statuses.distributable_visibility
    elsif author?
      exclude_direct? ? account.statuses.where(visibility: %i(public unlisted private)) : account.statuses.all # NOTE: #merge! does not work without the #all
    elsif blocked?
      Status.none
    else
      filtered_scope
    end
  end

  def filtered_scope
    scope = account.statuses

    if exclude_direct?
      scope = scope.where(visibility: follower? ? %i(public unlisted private) : %i(public unlisted))
    else
      scope = account.statuses.left_outer_joins(:mentions)
      scope.merge!(scope.where(visibility: follower? ? %i(public unlisted private) : %i(public unlisted)).or(scope.where(mentions: { account_id: current_account.id })).group(Status.arel_table[:id]))
    end

    scope.merge!(filtered_reblogs_scope) if reblogs_may_occur?

    scope
  end

  def filtered_reblogs_scope
    scope = Status.left_outer_joins(reblog: :account)
    scope
      .where(reblog_of_id: nil)
      .or(
        scope
          # This is basically `Status.not_domain_blocked_by_account(current_account)`
          # and `Status.not_excluded_by_account(current_account)` but on the
          # `reblog` association. Unfortunately, there seem to be no clean way
          # to re-use those scopes in our case.
          .where(reblog: { accounts: { domain: nil } }).or(scope.where.not(reblog: { accounts: { domain: current_account.excluded_from_timeline_domains } }))
          .where.not(reblog: { account_id: current_account.excluded_from_timeline_account_ids })
      )
  end

  def only_media_scope
    Status.without_empty_attachments.joins(:media_attachments).merge(account.media_attachments).group(Status.arel_table[:id])
  end

  def no_replies_scope
    Status.without_replies
  end

  def no_reblogs_scope
    Status.without_reblogs
  end

  def pinned_scope
    account.pinned_statuses.group(Status.arel_table[:id], StatusPin.arel_table[:created_at])
  end

  def hashtag_scope
    tag = Tag.find_normalized(params[:tagged])

    if tag
      Status.tagged_with(tag.id)
    else
      Status.none
    end
  end

  def anonymous?
    current_account.nil?
  end

  def author?
    current_account.id == account.id
  end

  def blocked?
    account.blocking?(current_account) || (current_account.domain.present? && account.domain_blocking?(current_account.domain))
  end

  def follower?
    current_account.following?(account)
  end

  def reblogs_may_occur?
    !exclude_reblogs? && !only_media? && !tagged?
  end

  def pinned?
    truthy_param?(:pinned)
  end

  def only_media?
    truthy_param?(:only_media)
  end

  def exclude_direct?
    truthy_param?(:exclude_direct)
  end

  def exclude_replies?
    truthy_param?(:exclude_replies)
  end

  def exclude_reblogs?
    truthy_param?(:exclude_reblogs)
  end

  def tagged?
    params[:tagged].present?
  end

  def truthy_param?(key)
    ActiveModel::Type::Boolean.new.cast(params[key])
  end
end
=== UpdateStatusService (head) ===
# frozen_string_literal: true

class UpdateStatusService < BaseService
  include Redisable
  include LanguagesHelper

  class NoChangesSubmittedError < StandardError; end

  # @param [Status] status
  # @param [Integer] account_id
  # @param [Hash] options
  # @option options [Array<Integer>] :media_ids
  # @option options [Array<Hash>] :media_attributes
  # @option options [Hash] :poll
  # @option options [String] :text
  # @option options [String] :spoiler_text
  # @option options [Boolean] :sensitive
  # @option options [String] :language
  def call(status, account_id, options = {})
    @status                    = status
    @options                   = options
    @account_id                = account_id
    @media_attachments_changed = false
    @poll_changed              = false

    Status.transaction do
      create_previous_edit!
      update_media_attachments! if @options.key?(:media_ids)
      update_poll! if @options.key?(:poll)
      update_immediate_attributes!
      create_edit!
    end

    queue_poll_notifications!
    reset_preview_card!
    update_metadata!
    broadcast_updates!

    @status
  rescue NoChangesSubmittedError
    # For calls that result in no changes, swallow the error
    # but get back to the original state

    @status.reload
  end

  private

  def update_media_attachments!
    previous_media_attachments = @status.ordered_media_attachments.to_a
    next_media_attachments     = validate_media!
    added_media_attachments    = next_media_attachments - previous_media_attachments

    (@options[:media_attributes] || []).each do |attributes|
      media = next_media_attachments.find { |attachment| attachment.id == attributes[:id].to_i }
      next if media.nil?

      media.update!(attributes.slice(:thumbnail, :description, :focus))
      @media_attachments_changed ||= media.significantly_changed?
    end
=== StatusFinder ===
# frozen_string_literal: true

class StatusFinder
  attr_reader :url

  def initialize(url)
    @url = url
  end

  def status
    verify_action!

    raise ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound unless TagManager.instance.local_url?(url)

    case recognized_params[:controller]
    when 'statuses'
      Status.find(recognized_params[:id])
    else
      raise ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
    end
  end

  private

  def recognized_params
    Rails.application.routes.recognize_path(url)
  end

  def verify_action!
    raise ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound unless recognized_params[:action] == 'show'
  end
end

content.text:
I now have a complete picture across all seven steps. Here is the audit.

---

# Status Contract Audit — Mastodon

## Step 1 — Orientation

**Project:** Mastodon, a federated (ActivityPub) social server. Ruby on Rails backend + React/TypeScript frontend. ~4,100 files, Ruby-dominant (`app/` ~13k symbols).

**Layout (Rails conventions):**
- `app/models/` — ActiveRecord models + `app/models/concerns/` mixins
- `app/services/` — write/business operations (`*Service`, called as `.new.call`)
- `app/workers/` — Sidekiq async jobs (`*Worker#perform`), incl. `app/workers/scheduler/` cron jobs
- `app/lib/` — domain helpers, incl. `app/lib/activitypub/` (federation) and `app/lib/feed_manager.rb`
- `app/controllers/` — REST API (`app/controllers/api/v1|v2`), ActivityPub, web
- `app/serializers/` — JSON output (REST + ActivityPub)
- `app/policies/` — Pundit authorization

**Central content model:** `Status` at `app/models/status.rb:34` — the post users create. It is a hub (124–191 callers). It feeds timelines, notifications, federation, moderation, and trends. Built on shared concerns in `app/models/concerns/status/` and generic concerns (`Cacheable`, `Discard::Model`, `Paginable`, `RateLimitable`). Related core: `Account` (`app/models/account.rb`), `FeedManager` (`app/lib/feed_manager.rb`), `PostStatusService` (`app/services/post_status_service.rb`).

---

## Step 2 — The Status contract and what it is built on

**Model:** `app/models/status.rb:34`

**Schema/columns** (`status.rb:3-32`): key fields `deleted_at` (soft-delete), `edited_at`, `visibility` (enum, default public), `reblog_of_id`, `in_reply_to_id`, `conversation_id`, `poll_id`, `uri`/`url`, `quote_approval_policy`, `ordered_media_attachment_ids`.

**Concerns it includes** (`status.rb:35-46`):
- `Cacheable` (generic) — `cache_associated`, fragment caching
- `Discard::Model` (gem) — soft delete via `deleted_at` (`status.rb:66`)
- `Paginable`, `RateLimitable` (generic; `rate_limit by: :account` `status.rb:64`)
- `Status::FaspConcern` — `app/models/concerns/status/fasp_concern.rb:3` — after_commit hooks announcing create/update/delete/trend to FASP providers
- `Status::FetchRepliesConcern` — `.../fetch_replies_concern.rb:3` — remote reply-fetch debounce scopes (`should_fetch_replies?`)
- `Status::SafeReblogInsert` — `.../safe_reblog_insert.rb:3` — overrides `_insert_record` so reblogs of discarded statuses can't be inserted (DB-level guard)
- `Status::SearchConcern` — `.../search_concern.rb:3` — `indexable` scope, `searchable_by`/`searchable_text`/`searchable_properties` (Chewy)
- `Status::SnapshotConcern` — `.../snapshot_concern.rb:3` — `has_many :edits` (StatusEdit), `build_snapshot`/`snapshot!`, `edited?`
- `Status::ThreadingConcern` — `.../threading_concern.rb:3` — `ancestors`/`descendants`/`self_replies`, `permitted_statuses_from_ids` (filters via StatusFilter)
- `Status::Visibility` — `.../visibility.rb:3` — `visibility` enum, `distributable?`/`hidden?`/`sign?`, `distributable_visibility`/`list_eligible_visibility`/`not_direct_visibility` scopes, `set_visibility`
- `Status::InteractionPolicyConcern` — `.../interaction_policy_concern.rb:3` — `composed_of :quote_interaction_policy`, `quote_policy_for_account`

**Associations other records hang off** (`status.rb:75-118`): `account`, `application`, `conversation`/`owned_conversation`, `preloadable_poll`/`poll`, `thread`/`reblog` (self-refs), `favourites`, `bookmarks`, `reblogs`, `replies`, `mentions`/`active_mentions`, `media_attachments` (nullify), `tagged_objects`, `quotes`/`quote`, `tags` (HABTM), `preview_cards_status` (delete), `notification` (polymorphic activity), `status_stat`, `trend` (StatusTrend), `edits`.

**What a teammate must know before changing it:**
- `default_scope { recent.kept }` (`status.rb:128`) — every query silently hides discarded rows; bypassing needs `unscoped`/`with_discarded`.
- Soft-delete via `discard`/`deleted_at`; `discard_with_reblogs` (`status.rb:400`) cascades to reblogs.
- Dense callback chain (`status.rb:157-184`): webhooks, counter caches, conversation linking, snowflake IDs, FASP. Order matters (`unlink_from_conversations!` is `prepend: true`, `status.rb:178`).
- Counter caches drift if create/destroy paths change (`increment/decrement_counter_caches` `status.rb:479-493`).
- `CACHEABLE_ASSOCIATIONS` (`status.rb:48-60`) and Chewy `update_index` (`status.rb:72-73`) must stay in sync with associations.

---

## Step 3 — How a status is created and distributed

Entry: **`PostStatusService#call`** (`app/services/post_status_service.rb:42`).

**Inline / synchronous:**
1. `preprocess_attributes!` (`:72`) — resolve visibility, sensitivity, schedule.
2. `process_status!` (`:84`) — build on `account.statuses`, `ProcessMentionsService` (`:86`), tag/quote attach (`:89-90`), `Antispam` preflight (`:92`), then `@status.save!` inside a transaction (`:97-99`). Save fires all model callbacks (snowflake ID, conversation, counter caches, webhooks, FASP create).
3. `postprocess_status!` (`:162`): `ProcessHashtagsService`, `Trends.tags.register`.

**Async / queued** (`postprocess_status!` `:163-170`):
- `LinkCrawlWorker.perform_async` (`:165`) — preview card.
- `DistributionWorker.perform_async` (`:166`) → `FanOutOnWriteService` (local fan-out).
- `EmailDistributionWorker` (`:184`, delayed).
- `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker.perform_async` (`:168`) — federation out.
- `PollExpirationNotifyWorker` (`:169`), `ActivityPub::QuoteRequestWorker` (`:170`).

**Local fan-out** — `DistributionWorker#perform` (`app/workers/distribution_worker.rb:8`, redis-locked) → **`FanOutOnWriteService#call`** (`app/services/fan_out_on_write_service.rb:12`):
- `check_race_condition!` (`:29`, nil-visibility guard), `warm_payload_cache!` (`:169`).
- `deliver_to_self!` → `FeedManager.push_to_home` (`:71`).
- Notifications: `notify_quoted_account!`/`notify_mentioned_accounts!`/`notify_about_update!` → `LocalNotificationWorker` (`:75-112`).
- Feed inserts: `deliver_to_all_followers!`/`deliver_to_lists!`/`deliver_to_mentioned_followers!`/`deliver_to_hashtag_followers!` → `FeedInsertWorker.push_bulk` (`:114-144`).
- Streaming: `broadcast_to_hashtag_streams!`/`broadcast_to_public_streams!` via `redis.publish` (`:146-163`).

**Federation out** — `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker#perform` (`app/workers/activitypub/distribution_worker.rb:11`) → recipients from `StatusReachFinder#inboxes` → `ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker` per inbox.

---

## Step 4 — Every dependent of the Status contract (grouped, exhaustive)

### Feeds & timelines
- `FeedManager#push_to_home`/`unpush_from_home`/`unpush_from_list` and `clear_from_home` `app/lib/feed_manager.rb:231`, `clear_from_list:251`, `clear_from_lists:271` — insert/remove status from redis feeds.
- `FanOutOnWriteService` `app/services/fan_out_on_write_service.rb:12` — local fan-out.
- `FeedInsertWorker#perform` `app/workers/feed_insert_worker.rb:7` — push one status to one feed.
- `DistributionWorker#perform` `app/workers/distribution_worker.rb:8` — loads Status, drives fan-out.
- `PushUpdateWorker#perform` `app/workers/push_update_worker.rb:7` — streams status edit payload.
- `Feed#from_redis` `app/models/feed.rb:22` — hydrates statuses from feed IDs.
- `PublicFeed` scopes `app/models/public_feed.rb:88,92,96,100,104,108,112,116` — public/local/remote timeline query.
- `TagFeed` `app/models/tag_feed.rb:51,55,59` — hashtag timeline query.
- `LinkFeed#attached_to_preview_card` `app/models/link_feed.rb:42` — link timeline.
- `AccountStatusesFilter` `app/lib/account_statuses_filter.rb:34,48,63,78,82,86,90,94` — visibility-filtered account timeline.
- `StatusCacheHydrator` `app/lib/status_cache_hydrator.rb:55,29,35` — builds cached REST payload.
- `InlineRenderer` (`fan_out_on_write_service.rb:181`) — renders status for stream/cache.
- `AccountsController` scopes `app/controllers/accounts_controller.rb:30,55,59,66` — profile statuses.
- Timeline controllers: `Api::V1::Timelines::HomeController:31`, `ListController:27`, `PublicController:31`, `TagController:25`, `LinkController:24`.
- `Api::V1::StatusesController` index/show/set_* `app/controllers/api/v1/statuses_controller.rb:19,24,95,99,106,113`; `Api::V1::Statuses::BaseController#set_status:10`; `ContextsController:21,61`.
- `Api::V1::Accounts::StatusesController#preloaded_account_statuses:28`; `BookmarksController:19`; `FavouritesController:19`.

### Federation (ActivityPub)
- `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker#perform` `app/workers/activitypub/distribution_worker.rb:11` — outbound create/announce.
- `ActivityPub::StatusUpdateDistributionWorker#perform` `app/workers/activitypub/status_update_distribution_worker.rb:6` — outbound edit.
- `ActivityPub::DistributePollUpdateWorker#perform` `app/workers/activitypub/distribute_poll_update_worker.rb:9` — poll update.
- `ActivityPub::FetchRepliesWorker:9` / `ActivityPub::FetchAllRepliesWorker:19` / `ActivityPub::FetchAllRepliesService#filter_replies` `app/services/activitypub/fetch_all_replies_service.rb:17` — inbound reply backfill.

## Step 5 — How status identity & visibility are guarded

**Existence / identity guards:**
- `Status.find` raising `ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound`, swallowed in workers: `DistributionWorker:11-13`, `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker:16` — a deleted status simply no-ops.
- `default_scope { recent.kept }` `status.rb:128` — `kept` (Discard) excludes `deleted_at IS NOT NULL`, so discarded statuses are invisible to all normal queries; teardown code must use `unscoped`/`with_discarded` (e.g. `discard_with_reblogs` `status.rb:402`, `reblogs_map` `status.rb:370`, `remove_reblogs` `remove_status_service.rb` `rewhere(deleted_at:...)`).
- `Status::SafeReblogInsert` `safe_reblog_insert.rb:20,72` — DB-level `WHERE deleted_at IS NULL` so a reblog of a just-discarded status can't be inserted (race guard).
- `FanOutOnWriteService#check_race_condition!` `fan_out_on_write_service.rb:29-39` — raises `RaceConditionError` to requeue if `visibility` is nil.
- `StatusFinder#verify_action!` + `local_url?` `app/lib/status_finder.rb:24,12` — only resolves genuine local status URLs.

**Visibility / authorization guards:**
- `Status::Visibility#distributable?` `visibility.rb:31` (public||unlisted) and `hidden?` `:27` — the canonical "is this publicly distributable" check, used by `update_statistics` `status.rb:474`, `StatusReachFinder#distributable?` `status_reach_finder.rb:101`, `FanOutOnWriteService#broadcastable?` `:188`, FASP hooks `fasp_concern.rb:17,29,36`, `should_fetch_replies?` `fetch_replies_concern.rb:38`.
- Visibility scopes: `distributable_visibility`/`list_eligible_visibility`/`not_direct_visibility` `visibility.rb:12-14` — applied across feeds (`AccountStatusesFilter:35,50`, `RepliesController:34`, `self_replies` `threading_concern.rb:33`).
- `StatusPolicy#show?` `app/policies/status_policy.rb:4` — full visibility check: `author.unavailable?`, mention-required (direct/limited), private→follower/mention, block/domain-block. Also `quote?`/`reblog?`/`favourite?`/`destroy?`/`update?`.
- `StatusFilter#filtered?` `app/lib/status_filter.rb:11` — wraps `StatusPolicy.show?` plus block/mute/domain-block/silence; used by `Status::ThreadingConcern#permitted_statuses_from_ids` `threading_concern.rb:14`.
- `AccountStatusesFilter#initial_scope` `account_statuses_filter.rb:34` — gates account timelines by anonymous/author/blocked/follower; `Status.none` when `account.unavailable?`.
- `StatusReachFinder` `status_reach_finder.rb` — `distributable?`/`unsafe?` gate which interactors receive delete/update activities; `inboxes_without_suspended_for` `:118` drops suspended accounts.
- Author availability: `StatusPolicy#show?` checks `author.unavailable?` `:5`; reach/fan-out skip suspended (`FanOutOnWriteService#call:17` `proper.account.suspended?`).

## Step 6 — Blast radius assessment (ranked by risk)

The change touches three axes: **storage** (columns/associations/soft-delete), **visibility** (enum + `distributable?`), **teardown** (discard/destroy cascade + counter caches). 173 direct callers, 322 affected symbols, 112 files (`sense_blast`).

**🔴 Highest risk — teardown / soft-delete semantics (data loss / orphans / drift if wrong):**
1. `Status::SafeReblogInsert` `safe_reblog_insert.rb:20` — overrides AR internals (`_insert_record`); brittle to any column/insert change; failure silently inserts reblogs of dead statuses.
2. `discard_with_reblogs` `status.rb:400` + `RemoveStatusService` `remove_status_service.rb` + `BatchedRemoveStatusService:10` + `RemovalWorker:6` — cascade delete + redis unpush + federation Undo. Order-sensitive.
3. `increment/decrement_counter_caches` `status.rb:479-493` → `Account#statuses_count`, reblog/replies counts — silent drift if create/destroy path changes.
4. `unlink_from_conversations!` `status.rb:406` (`prepend: true`) + `update_conversation` `:455` + `AccountConversation` — conversation integrity.
5. `dependent:` associations `status.rb:89-118` (destroy/nullify/delete/nil) — changing them orphans favourites/bookmarks/mentions/media/edits/quotes/poll/preview_card/notification.
6. `DeleteAccountService` / `SuspendAccountService` / `AccountStatusesCleanupPolicy` / `Vacuum::StatusesVacuum:34` — bulk teardown over (un)scoped statuses; rely on `kept`/`deleted_at`.

**🟠 High risk — visibility contract:**
7. `Status::Visibility` (`distributable?`, scopes, enum) — consumed by `StatusReachFinder`, `FanOutOnWriteService#broadcastable?`, FASP, fetch-replies, feeds. A visibility-storage change breaks federation reach + timeline eligibility.
8. `StatusPolicy` `app/policies/status_policy.rb` + `StatusFilter` `app/lib/status_filter.rb` + `AccountStatusesFilter` — leak risk: a wrong guard exposes private/direct posts.
9. `default_scope ... kept` `status.rb:128` — any teardown code not using `unscoped` will mis-handle discarded rows.

**🟠 High risk — distribution / federation fan-out:**
10. `FanOutOnWriteService` + `FeedManager` + `FeedInsertWorker` — feed corruption if status shape/visibility changes.
11. `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker` / `StatusUpdateDistributionWorker` / `StatusReachFinder` / `ActivityPub::Activity::{Create,Update,Delete,Announce,Undo}` — inbound/outbound federation.

**🟡 Medium risk — derived/caching/search:**
12. `StatusCacheHydrator` + `CACHEABLE_ASSOCIATIONS` `status.rb:48` + `cache_key v3` `:190` — stale/incorrect cached payloads; bump cache key if shape changes.
13. Chewy `update_index` `status.rb:72` + `Status::SearchConcern` + index importers — reindex needed.
14. Trends (`Trends::Statuses`, `StatusTrend`), `Status::FaspConcern` hooks.

**🟢 Lower risk — read/report paths:** REST serializers, `BackupService`, `AnnualReportsPresenter`, admin/CLI tools, metrics — mostly read; verify after.

**Must re-verify after change:** counter caches (`statuses_count`, replies/reblogs); soft-delete cascade leaves no orphans; reblog-insert guard still rejects discarded; visibility enum mapping unchanged for federation; feed insert/unpush; private/direct not leaked via policy/filter; cache key bumped; Chewy reindex; FASP/trends hooks fire on the right transitions.

I now have a complete picture across all seven steps. Here is the audit.

---

# Status Contract Audit — Mastodon

## Step 1 — Orientation

**Project:** Mastodon, a federated (ActivityPub) social server. Ruby on Rails backend + React/TypeScript frontend. ~4,100 files, Ruby-dominant (`app/` ~13k symbols).

**Layout (Rails conventions):**
- `app/models/` — ActiveRecord models + `app/models/concerns/` mixins
- `app/services/` — write/business operations (`*Service`, called as `.new.call`)
- `app/workers/` — Sidekiq async jobs (`*Worker#perform`), incl. `app/workers/scheduler/` cron jobs
- `app/lib/` — domain helpers, incl. `app/lib/activitypub/` (federation) and `app/lib/feed_manager.rb`
- `app/controllers/` — REST API (`app/controllers/api/v1|v2`), ActivityPub, web
- `app/serializers/` — JSON output (REST + ActivityPub)
- `app/policies/` — Pundit authorization

**Central content model:** `Status` at `app/models/status.rb:34` — the post users create. It is a hub (124–191 callers). It feeds timelines, notifications, federation, moderation, and trends. Built on shared concerns in `app/models/concerns/status/` and generic concerns (`Cacheable`, `Discard::Model`, `Paginable`, `RateLimitable`). Related core: `Account` (`app/models/account.rb`), `FeedManager` (`app/lib/feed_manager.rb`), `PostStatusService` (`app/services/post_status_service.rb`).

---

## Step 2 — The Status contract and what it is built on

**Model:** `app/models/status.rb:34`

**Schema/columns** (`status.rb:3-32`): key fields `deleted_at` (soft-delete), `edited_at`, `visibility` (enum, default public), `reblog_of_id`, `in_reply_to_id`, `conversation_id`, `poll_id`, `uri`/`url`, `quote_approval_policy`, `ordered_media_attachment_ids`.

**Concerns it includes** (`status.rb:35-46`):
- `Cacheable` (generic) — `cache_associated`, fragment caching
- `Discard::Model` (gem) — soft delete via `deleted_at` (`status.rb:66`)
- `Paginable`, `RateLimitable` (generic; `rate_limit by: :account` `status.rb:64`)
- `Status::FaspConcern` — `app/models/concerns/status/fasp_concern.rb:3` — after_commit hooks announcing create/update/delete/trend to FASP providers
- `Status::FetchRepliesConcern` — `.../fetch_replies_concern.rb:3` — remote reply-fetch debounce scopes (`should_fetch_replies?`)
- `Status::SafeReblogInsert` — `.../safe_reblog_insert.rb:3` — overrides `_insert_record` so reblogs of discarded statuses can't be inserted (DB-level guard)
- `Status::SearchConcern` — `.../search_concern.rb:3` — `indexable` scope, `searchable_by`/`searchable_text`/`searchable_properties` (Chewy)
- `Status::SnapshotConcern` — `.../snapshot_concern.rb:3` — `has_many :edits` (StatusEdit), `build_snapshot`/`snapshot!`, `edited?`
- `Status::ThreadingConcern` — `.../threading_concern.rb:3` — `ancestors`/`descendants`/`self_replies`, `permitted_statuses_from_ids` (filters via StatusFilter)
- `Status::Visibility` — `.../visibility.rb:3` — `visibility` enum, `distributable?`/`hidden?`/`sign?`, `distributable_visibility`/`list_eligible_visibility`/`not_direct_visibility` scopes, `set_visibility`
- `Status::InteractionPolicyConcern` — `.../interaction_policy_concern.rb:3` — `composed_of :quote_interaction_policy`, `quote_policy_for_account`

**Associations other records hang off** (`status.rb:75-118`): `account`, `application`, `conversation`/`owned_conversation`, `preloadable_poll`/`poll`, `thread`/`reblog` (self-refs), `favourites`, `bookmarks`, `reblogs`, `replies`, `mentions`/`active_mentions`, `media_attachments` (nullify), `tagged_objects`, `quotes`/`quote`, `tags` (HABTM), `preview_cards_status` (delete), `notification` (polymorphic activity), `status_stat`, `trend` (StatusTrend), `edits`.

**What a teammate must know before changing it:**
- `default_scope { recent.kept }` (`status.rb:128`) — every query silently hides discarded rows; bypassing needs `unscoped`/`with_discarded`.
- Soft-delete via `discard`/`deleted_at`; `discard_with_reblogs` (`status.rb:400`) cascades to reblogs.
- Dense callback chain (`status.rb:157-184`): webhooks, counter caches, conversation linking, snowflake IDs, FASP. Order matters (`unlink_from_conversations!` is `prepend: true`, `status.rb:178`).
- Counter caches drift if create/destroy paths change (`increment/decrement_counter_caches` `status.rb:479-493`).
- `CACHEABLE_ASSOCIATIONS` (`status.rb:48-60`) and Chewy `update_index` (`status.rb:72-73`) must stay in sync with associations.

---

## Step 3 — How a status is created and distributed

Entry: **`PostStatusService#call`** (`app/services/post_status_service.rb:42`).

**Inline / synchronous:**
1. `preprocess_attributes!` (`:72`) — resolve visibility, sensitivity, schedule.
2. `process_status!` (`:84`) — build on `account.statuses`, `ProcessMentionsService` (`:86`), tag/quote attach (`:89-90`), `Antispam` preflight (`:92`), then `@status.save!` inside a transaction (`:97-99`). Save fires all model callbacks (snowflake ID, conversation, counter caches, webhooks, FASP create).
3. `postprocess_status!` (`:162`): `ProcessHashtagsService`, `Trends.tags.register`.

**Async / queued** (`postprocess_status!` `:163-170`):
- `LinkCrawlWorker.perform_async` (`:165`) — preview card.
- `DistributionWorker.perform_async` (`:166`) → `FanOutOnWriteService` (local fan-out).
- `EmailDistributionWorker` (`:184`, delayed).
- `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker.perform_async` (`:168`) — federation out.
- `PollExpirationNotifyWorker` (`:169`), `ActivityPub::QuoteRequestWorker` (`:170`).

**Local fan-out** — `DistributionWorker#perform` (`app/workers/distribution_worker.rb:8`, redis-locked) → **`FanOutOnWriteService#call`** (`app/services/fan_out_on_write_service.rb:12`):
- `check_race_condition!` (`:29`, nil-visibility guard), `warm_payload_cache!` (`:169`).
- `deliver_to_self!` → `FeedManager.push_to_home` (`:71`).
- Notifications: `notify_quoted_account!`/`notify_mentioned_accounts!`/`notify_about_update!` → `LocalNotificationWorker` (`:75-112`).
- Feed inserts: `deliver_to_all_followers!`/`deliver_to_lists!`/`deliver_to_mentioned_followers!`/`deliver_to_hashtag_followers!` → `FeedInsertWorker.push_bulk` (`:114-144`).
- Streaming: `broadcast_to_hashtag_streams!`/`broadcast_to_public_streams!` via `redis.publish` (`:146-163`).

**Federation out** — `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker#perform` (`app/workers/activitypub/distribution_worker.rb:11`) → recipients from `StatusReachFinder#inboxes` → `ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker` per inbox.

---

## Step 4 — Every dependent of the Status contract (grouped, exhaustive)

- `FanOutOnWriteService` `app/services/fan_out_on_write_service.rb:12` — local fan-out.

- `TagFeed` `app/models/tag_feed.rb:51,55,59` — hashtag timeline query.

- `Api::V1::StatusesController` index/show/set_* `app/controllers/api/v1/statuses_controller.rb:19,24,95,99,106,113`; `Api::V1::Statuses::BaseController#set_status:10`; `ContextsController:21,61`.
- `Api::V1::Accounts::StatusesController#preloaded_account_statuses:28`; `BookmarksController:19`; `FavouritesController:19`.

### Federation (ActivityPub)
- `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker#perform` `app/workers/activitypub/distribution_worker.rb:11` — outbound create/announce.

## Step 5 — How status identity & visibility are guarded

**Existence / identity guards:**
- `Status.find` raising `ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound`, swallowed in workers: `DistributionWorker:11-13`, `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker:16` — a deleted status simply no-ops.
- `default_scope { recent.kept }` `status.rb:128` — `kept` (Discard) excludes `deleted_at IS NOT NULL`, so discarded statuses are invisible to all normal queries; teardown code must use `unscoped`/`with_discarded` (e.g. `discard_with_reblogs` `status.rb:402`, `reblogs_map` `status.rb:370`, `remove_reblogs` `remove_status_service.rb` `rewhere(deleted_at:...)`).
- `Status::SafeReblogInsert` `safe_reblog_insert.rb:20,72` — DB-level `WHERE deleted_at IS NULL` so a reblog of a just-discarded status can't be inserted (race guard).
- `FanOutOnWriteService#check_race_condition!` `fan_out_on_write_service.rb:29-39` — raises `RaceConditionError` to requeue if `visibility` is nil.
- `StatusFinder#verify_action!` + `local_url?` `app/lib/status_finder.rb:24,12` — only resolves genuine local status URLs.

**Visibility / authorization guards:**
- `Status::Visibility#distributable?` `visibility.rb:31` (public||unlisted) and `hidden?` `:27` — the canonical "is this publicly distributable" check, used by `update_statistics` `status.rb:474`, `StatusReachFinder#distributable?` `status_reach_finder.rb:101`, `FanOutOnWriteService#broadcastable?` `:188`, FASP hooks `fasp_concern.rb:17,29,36`, `should_fetch_replies?` `fetch_replies_concern.rb:38`.
- Visibility scopes: `distributable_visibility`/`list_eligible_visibility`/`not_direct_visibility` `visibility.rb:12-14` — applied across feeds (`AccountStatusesFilter:35,50`, `RepliesController:34`, `self_replies` `threading_concern.rb:33`).
- `StatusPolicy#show?` `app/policies/status_policy.rb:4` — full visibility check: `author.unavailable?`, mention-required (direct/limited), private→follower/mention, block/domain-block. Also `quote?`/`reblog?`/`favourite?`/`destroy?`/`update?`.
- `StatusFilter#filtered?` `app/lib/status_filter.rb:11` — wraps `StatusPolicy.show?` plus block/mute/domain-block/silence; used by `Status::ThreadingConcern#permitted_statuses_from_ids` `threading_concern.rb:14`.
- `AccountStatusesFilter#initial_scope` `account_statuses_filter.rb:34` — gates account timelines by anonymous/author/blocked/follower; `Status.none` when `account.unavailable?`.
- `StatusReachFinder` `status_reach_finder.rb` — `distributable?`/`unsafe?` gate which interactors receive delete/update activities; `inboxes_without_suspended_for` `:118` drops suspended accounts.
- Author availability: `StatusPolicy#show?` checks `author.unavailable?` `:5`; reach/fan-out skip suspended (`FanOutOnWriteService#call:17` `proper.account.suspended?`).

## Step 6 — Blast radius assessment (ranked by risk)

The change touches three axes: **storage** (columns/associations/soft-delete), **visibility** (enum + `distributable?`), **teardown** (discard/destroy cascade + counter caches). 173 direct callers, 322 affected symbols, 112 files (`sense_blast`).

**🔴 Highest risk — teardown / soft-delete semantics (data loss / orphans / drift if wrong):**
1. `Status::SafeReblogInsert` `safe_reblog_insert.rb:20` — overrides AR internals (`_insert_record`); brittle to any column/insert change; failure silently inserts reblogs of dead statuses.
2. `discard_with_reblogs` `status.rb:400` + `RemoveStatusService` `remove_status_service.rb` + `BatchedRemoveStatusService:10` + `RemovalWorker:6` — cascade delete + redis unpush + federation Undo. Order-sensitive.
3. `increment/decrement_counter_caches` `status.rb:479-493` → `Account#statuses_count`, reblog/replies counts — silent drift if create/destroy path changes.
4. `unlink_from_conversations!` `status.rb:406` (`prepend: true`) + `update_conversation` `:455` + `AccountConversation` — conversation integrity.
5. `dependent:` associations `status.rb:89-118` (destroy/nullify/delete/nil) — changing them orphans favourites/bookmarks/mentions/media/edits/quotes/poll/preview_card/notification.
6. `DeleteAccountService` / `SuspendAccountService` / `AccountStatusesCleanupPolicy` / `Vacuum::StatusesVacuum:34` — bulk teardown over (un)scoped statuses; rely on `kept`/`deleted_at`.

**🟠 High risk — visibility contract:**
7. `Status::Visibility` (`distributable?`, scopes, enum) — consumed by `StatusReachFinder`, `FanOutOnWriteService#broadcastable?`, FASP, fetch-replies, feeds. A visibility-storage change breaks federation reach + timeline eligibility.
8. `StatusPolicy` `app/policies/status_policy.rb` + `StatusFilter` `app/lib/status_filter.rb` + `AccountStatusesFilter` — leak risk: a wrong guard exposes private/direct posts.
9. `default_scope ... kept` `status.rb:128` — any teardown code not using `unscoped` will mis-handle discarded rows.

**🟠 High risk — distribution / federation fan-out:**
10. `FanOutOnWriteService` + `FeedManager` + `FeedInsertWorker` — feed corruption if status shape/visibility changes.
11. `ActivityPub::DistributionWorker` / `StatusUpdateDistributionWorker` / `StatusReachFinder` / `ActivityPub::Activity::{Create,Update,Delete,Announce,Undo}` — inbound/outbound federation.

**🟡 Medium risk — derived/caching/search:**
12. `StatusCacheHydrator` + `CACHEABLE_ASSOCIATIONS` `status.rb:48` + `cache_key v3` `:190` — stale/incorrect cached payloads; bump cache key if shape changes.
13. Chewy `update_index` `status.rb:72` + `Status::SearchConcern` + index importers — reindex needed.
14. Trends (`Trends::Statuses`, `StatusTrend`), `Status::FaspConcern` hooks.

**🟢 Lower risk — read/report paths:** REST serializers, `BackupService`, `AnnualReportsPresenter`, admin/CLI tools, metrics — mostly read; verify after.

**Must re-verify after change:** counter caches (`statuses_count`, replies/reblogs); soft-delete cascade leaves no orphans; reblog-insert guard still rejects discarded; visibility enum mapping unchanged for federation; feed insert/unpush; private/direct not leaked via policy/filter; cache key bumped; Chewy reindex; FASP/trends hooks fire on the right transitions.
